Records.description: Non-planar (crossed) double-box integral family (N12) for two-loop $qq' \to V_1^* V_2^*$ with massless internal lines and two off-shell external legs. Momentum mapping $p_{1,\mathrm{fam}}=-q_4$, $p_{2,\mathrm{fam}}=-q_3$, $p_{3,\mathrm{fam}}=q_2$, $p_{4,\mathrm{fam}}=q_1$; Mandelstam: $s_\mathrm{fam}=S$, $t_\mathrm{fam}=T$, $u_\mathrm{fam}=U$. Master integrals computed via canonical differential equations in arXiv:1404.5590.
Records.familyName: non-planar crossed double-box s-channel / planar double-box s-channel / planar double-box t-channel / planar double-box u-channel / non-planar crossed double-box t-channel / non-planar crossed double-box direct channel
Records.location: Section 2 of arXiv:1404.5590, Eq.(2.5)-(2.6); used in Section 3 of arXiv:1408.6409

Records.description: Planar double-box integral family (P12) for two-loop qq' -> V1* V2* with massless internal lines and two off-shell external legs. Momentum mapping p1_fam=-q3, p2_fam=-q4, p3_fam=q1, p4_fam=q2; Mandelstam: s_fam=S, t_fam=T, u_fam=U. Master integrals computed via canonical differential equations in arXiv:1402.7078.
Records.location: Section 2 of arXiv:1402.7078, Eq.(2.8)-(2.9); used in Section 3 of arXiv:1408.6409
